nasb.text: and you will even be brought before governors and kings for My sake, as a testimony to them and to the Gentiles.

esv.text: and you will be dragged before governors and kings for my sake, to bear witness before them and the Gentiles.

cnv.text: 你們為我的緣故，也要被帶到統治者和君王面前，向他們和外族人作見證。

ccb.text: 你们要因我的缘故被带到官长和君王面前，在他们和外族人面前为我做见证。

csbs.text: 为我的缘故，你们将被带到总督和君王面前，好对他们和外邦人做见证。
